
import { useState } from "react";

const BRANDMARK_B64 = "";

const BRAND = {
  richBlue: "#24313A", mid1: "#3A5056", mid2: "#415A63",
  steel: "#75848B", offWhite: "#F4F4F5", cream: "#F0EBE0",
  sky: "#B8D8E8", gold: "#C9A96E",
  goldDim: "rgba(201,169,110,0.15)", goldBorder: "rgba(201,169,110,0.3)",
};

const NAV_TABS = ["Building Wealth","Tax Planning","Risk Management","Estate Planning","Investing"];

const DEFAULT_STATE = {
  template: "dark", activeTab: 0,
  headline1: "Same", headline2: "Salary.",
  scenario: "Both DeShawn and Chris are 25-year-old pro athletes earning the same contract. Each takes home $8,000/month after taxes and living expenses. One has a plan. One doesn't.",
  insightText: "Most athletes don't lose their wealth overnight. They lose it one unplanned month at a time — without a strategy built for their income, timeline, and tax exposure.",
  statLabel: "Wealth Gap at 35", statValue: "$1.3M", statRef: "Same starting point · 10 year difference",
  showA1: true, showA2: true,
  a1Name: "DeShawn", a1Sub: "No advisor · No plan",
  a1Rows: [
    { label: "Monthly spend",   value: "$7,500",    color: "steel" },
    { label: "Monthly invested", value: "$500",     color: "steel" },
    { label: "Tax strategy",    value: "None",       color: "dim"   },
    { label: "Net worth at 35", value: "$72K",       color: "steel" },
    { label: "Status",          value: "Back to work", color: "dim" },
  ],
  a2Name: "Chris", a2Sub: "Moment client · Has a plan",
  a2Rows: [
    { label: "Monthly spend",   value: "$3,000",        color: "cream" },
    { label: "Monthly invested", value: "$3,000",       color: "cream" },
    { label: "Business income", value: "$2,000/mo",     color: "cream" },
    { label: "Net worth at 35", value: "$1.4M",         color: "gold"  },
    { label: "Status",          value: "Financially free", color: "sky" },
  ],
};

const colorMap = {
  dark:  { steel: BRAND.steel, dim: "#4a5c66", cream: BRAND.cream, gold: BRAND.gold, sky: BRAND.sky },
  light: { steel: BRAND.steel, dim: "#aab5bb", cream: BRAND.richBlue, gold: BRAND.mid1, sky: BRAND.mid2 },
};

function Brandmark({ size = 24, blend = true }) {
  return (
    <img src={`data:image/png;base64,${BRANDMARK_B64}`}
      style={{ width: size, height: size, objectFit: "contain", flexShrink: 0,
        mixBlendMode: blend ? "lighten" : "normal", filter: "brightness(1.1)" }}
      alt="Moment" />
  );
}

function TemplatePreview({ s }) {
  const isDark = s.template === "dark";
  const cols = colorMap[s.template];
  const bothHidden = !s.showA1 && !s.showA2;
  const oneShown   = (s.showA1 && !s.showA2) || (!s.showA1 && s.showA2);
  const rightCols  = bothHidden ? "0px" : oneShown ? "220px" : "240px";

  const navBg      = isDark ? "#131d23" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)";
  const cardBg     = isDark ? "#1b262e" : "#EEE8DC";
  const splitBdr   = isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.07)";
  const leftGrad   = isDark ? "linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(184,216,232,0.025) 0%,transparent 60%)" : "linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(184,216,232,0.12) 0%,transparent 50%)";
  const sceneCol   = isDark ? "rgba(184,216,232,0.45)" : BRAND.steel;
  const insightBg  = isDark ? "rgba(184,216,232,0.04)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.05)";
  const insightBdL = isDark ? BRAND.sky : BRAND.richBlue;
  const insightBd  = isDark ? "rgba(184,216,232,0.1)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.1)";
  const insightLbl = isDark ? BRAND.sky : BRAND.richBlue;
  const insightTxt = isDark ? "rgba(184,216,232,0.65)" : BRAND.mid1;
  const statBg     = isDark ? "rgba(36,49,58,0.8)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.06)";
  const statBd     = isDark ? "rgba(184,216,232,0.1)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.1)";
  const statVal    = isDark ? BRAND.cream : BRAND.richBlue;
  const rightBg    = isDark ? "rgba(0,0,0,0.15)" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.35)";
  const nameCol    = isDark ? BRAND.cream : BRAND.richBlue;
  const rowBd      = isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.06)";
  const divCol     = isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.07)";
  const footBg     = isDark ? "#131d23" : BRAND.richBlue;
  const footBdT    = isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.1)";
  const hl1        = isDark ? BRAND.cream : BRAND.richBlue;
  const hl2        = isDark ? BRAND.sky : BRAND.mid2;
  const brandTag   = isDark ? "rgba(240,235,224,0.35)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.3)";
  const topBar     = !isDark ? `linear-gradient(90deg,${BRAND.richBlue} 0%,${BRAND.mid1} 50%,${BRAND.sky} 100%)` : null;
  const activeBg   = isDark ? BRAND.goldDim : "rgba(36,49,58,0.08)";
  const activeBd   = isDark ? BRAND.goldBorder : "rgba(36,49,58,0.18)";
  const activeClr  = isDark ? BRAND.gold : BRAND.richBlue;
  const inactClr   = isDark ? "#4a5c66" : "#b0bcc2";

  const AthleteCol = ({ name, sub, rows, ruleColor }) => (
    <div>
      <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"1.2rem", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:"0.06em", color:nameCol, textTransform:"uppercase", lineHeight:1, marginBottom:2 }}>{name}</div>
      <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.58rem", fontWeight:400, letterSpacing:"0.1em", color:BRAND.steel, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:12 }}>{sub}</div>
      <div style={{ width:24, height:2, background:ruleColor, marginBottom:16, borderRadius:1 }} />
      {rows.map((row,i) => (
        <div key={i} style={{ display:"flex", justifyContent:"space-between", alignItems:"center", padding:"9px 0", borderBottom: i<rows.length-1 ? `1px solid ${rowBd}` : "none" }}>
          <span style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.66rem", fontWeight:400, letterSpacing:"0.08em", color:BRAND.steel }}>{row.label}</span>
          <span style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.72rem", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:"0.1em", textTransform:"uppercase", color:cols[row.color]||cols.steel }}>{row.value}</span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div style={{ width:"100%", borderRadius:6, overflow:"hidden", background:cardBg,
      border:`1px solid ${isDark?"rgba(184,216,232,0.08)":"rgba(36,49,58,0.12)"}`,
      boxShadow: isDark ? "0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" : "0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.15),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
      fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif" }}>

      {!isDark && <div style={{ height:3, background:topBar }} />}

      {/* Nav */}
      <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", gap:2, padding:"10px 18px", background:navBg, borderBottom:`1px solid ${isDark?"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)":"rgba(36,49,58,0.07)"}` }}>
        {NAV_TABS.map((tab,i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.56rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.14em", textTransform:"uppercase", padding:"4px 10px 5px", borderRadius:3,
            border:`1px solid ${i===s.activeTab?activeBd:"transparent"}`,
            background: i===s.activeTab?activeBg:"transparent",
            color: i===s.activeTab?activeClr:inactClr, whiteSpace:"nowrap" }}>{tab}</div>
        ))}
        <div style={{ flex:1 }} />
        <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center" }}>
          <Brandmark size={20} blend={isDark} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Body split */}
      <div style={{ display:"grid", gridTemplateColumns: bothHidden ? "1fr" : `1fr ${rightCols}`, minHeight:380 }}>

        {/* LEFT */}
        <div style={{ padding:"28px 26px 24px", borderRight: bothHidden ? "none" : `1px solid ${splitBdr}`,
          display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", background:leftGrad }}>
          <div style={{ marginBottom:14 }}>
            <span style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.56rem", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:"0.18em", textTransform:"uppercase",
              color:isDark?BRAND.gold:BRAND.richBlue,
              border:`1px solid ${isDark?BRAND.goldBorder:"rgba(36,49,58,0.2)"}`,
              background:isDark?BRAND.goldDim:"rgba(36,49,58,0.06)",
              padding:"3px 10px 4px", borderRadius:3 }}>The Comparison</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"3.8rem", fontWeight:800, lineHeight:0.92, letterSpacing:"-0.01em", textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:14 }}>
            <span style={{ color:hl1, display:"block" }}>{s.headline1}</span>
            <span style={{ color:hl2, display:"block" }}>{s.headline2}</span>
          </div>
          <p style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.78rem", fontWeight:300, color:sceneCol, lineHeight:1.7, letterSpacing:"0.02em", marginBottom:20 }}>{s.scenario}</p>
          <div style={{ marginTop:"auto", background:insightBg, border:`1px solid ${insightBd}`, borderLeft:`2px solid ${insightBdL}`, padding:"16px 18px", borderRadius:2 }}>
            <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.6rem", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:"0.24em", color:insightLbl, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:8, opacity:0.9 }}>Moment Insight</div>
            <p style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.84rem", fontWeight:300, color:insightTxt, lineHeight:1.78 }}>{s.insightText}</p>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", marginTop:18 }}>
            <div style={{ background:statBg, border:`1px solid ${statBd}`, padding:"8px 14px", borderRadius:3, marginRight:12 }}>
              <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.48rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.22em", color:BRAND.sky, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:3, opacity:0.8 }}>{s.statLabel}</div>
              <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"1.2rem", fontWeight:700, color:statVal, letterSpacing:"0.02em", lineHeight:1 }}>{s.statValue}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.68rem", fontWeight:300, color:BRAND.sky, fontStyle:"italic", opacity:0.5 }}>{s.statRef}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* RIGHT — only renders if at least one athlete is shown */}
        {!bothHidden && (
          <div style={{ padding:"24px 20px", background:rightBg, display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", gap: s.showA1 && s.showA2 ? 0 : 0 }}>
            {s.showA1 && (
              <AthleteCol name={s.a1Name} sub={s.a1Sub} rows={s.a1Rows} ruleColor={BRAND.steel} />
            )}
            {s.showA1 && s.showA2 && (
              <div style={{ height:1, background:divCol, margin:"14px 0" }} />
            )}
            {s.showA2 && (
              <AthleteCol name={s.a2Name} sub={s.a2Sub} rows={s.a2Rows} ruleColor={isDark?BRAND.gold:BRAND.sky} />
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Footer */}
      <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"space-between", padding:"12px 18px", background:footBg, borderTop:`1px solid ${footBdT}` }}>
        <span style={{ fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif", fontSize:"0.78rem", fontStyle:"italic", fontWeight:400, color:BRAND.sky, opacity:0.55, letterSpacing:"0.05em" }}>This Is Your Moment.</span>
        <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", opacity:0.5 }}>
          <Brandmark size={22} blend={true} />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── Shared form components ──────────────────────────
function Field({ label, value, onChange, multiline }) {
  const base = { width:"100%", background:"rgba(36,49,58,0.6)", border:"1px solid rgba(184,216,232,0.1)", borderRadius:4, color:"#F0EBE0", fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.78rem", padding:"7px 10px", outline:"none", resize: multiline?"vertical":"none", lineHeight:1.5 };
  return (
    <div style={{ marginBottom:10 }}>
      <label style={{ display:"block", fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.58rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.2em", color:BRAND.steel, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:4 }}>{label}</label>
      {multiline
        ? <textarea value={value} onChange={e=>onChange(e.target.value)} rows={3} style={base} />
        : <input value={value} onChange={e=>onChange(e.target.value)} style={base} />}
    </div>
  );
}

const VALUE_COLORS = ["cream","gold","sky","steel","dim"];
const colorLabels = { cream:"White/Pos", gold:"Gold", sky:"Sky Blue", steel:"Grey", dim:"Dim/Neg" };

function RowEditor({ rows, onChange, template }) {
  const cols = colorMap[template];
  return (
    <div>
      {rows.map((row,i) => (
        <div key={i} style={{ display:"grid", gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr auto", gap:6, marginBottom:6, alignItems:"center" }}>
          <input value={row.label} onChange={e=>{ const r=[...rows]; r[i]={...r[i],label:e.target.value}; onChange(r); }} placeholder="Label"
            style={{ background:"rgba(36,49,58,0.6)", border:"1px solid rgba(184,216,232,0.1)", borderRadius:4, color:"#F0EBE0", fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.72rem", padding:"5px 8px", outline:"none" }} />
          <input value={row.value} onChange={e=>{ const r=[...rows]; r[i]={...r[i],value:e.target.value}; onChange(r); }} placeholder="Value"
            style={{ background:"rgba(36,49,58,0.6)", border:"1px solid rgba(184,216,232,0.1)", borderRadius:4, color:cols[row.color]||cols.steel, fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.76rem", fontWeight:700, padding:"5px 8px", outline:"none" }} />
          <select value={row.color} onChange={e=>{ const r=[...rows]; r[i]={...r[i],color:e.target.value}; onChange(r); }}
            style={{ background:"#1b262e", border:"1px solid rgba(184,216,232,0.1)", borderRadius:4, color:BRAND.steel, fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.62rem", padding:"5px 6px", outline:"none", cursor:"pointer" }}>
            {VALUE_COLORS.map(c=><option key={c} value={c}>{colorLabels[c]}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function Section({ title, children, defaultOpen=true }) {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);
  return (
    <div style={{ marginBottom:2 }}>
      <button onClick={()=>setOpen(o=>!o)} style={{ width:"100%", display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"space-between", background:"rgba(36,49,58,0.4)", border:"none", borderRadius:4, color:BRAND.sky, fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.62rem", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:"0.2em", textTransform:"uppercase", padding:"8px 12px", cursor:"pointer", marginBottom: open?10:2 }}>
        {title} <span style={{ opacity:0.5 }}>{open?"▲":"▼"}</span>
      </button>
      {open && <div style={{ padding:"0 2px" }}>{children}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

function Toggle({ label, checked, onChange }) {
  return (
    <div onClick={()=>onChange(!checked)} style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"space-between", padding:"8px 10px", background:"rgba(36,49,58,0.3)", borderRadius:4, cursor:"pointer", marginBottom:6, border:`1px solid ${checked?"rgba(184,216,232,0.15)":"rgba(184,216,232,0.06)"}`, userSelect:"none" }}>
      <span style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.65rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.14em", textTransform:"uppercase", color: checked ? BRAND.sky : BRAND.steel }}>{label}</span>
      <div style={{ width:32, height:16, borderRadius:8, background: checked ? "rgba(184,216,232,0.25)" : "rgba(36,49,58,0.8)", border:`1px solid ${checked?BRAND.sky:"rgba(184,216,232,0.15)"}`, position:"relative", transition:"all 0.2s" }}>
        <div style={{ position:"absolute", top:2, left: checked?14:2, width:10, height:10, borderRadius:"50%", background: checked ? BRAND.sky : BRAND.steel, transition:"left 0.2s" }} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function MomentEditor() {
  const [s, setS] = useState(DEFAULT_STATE);
  const set = (key, val) => setS(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: val }));

  return (
    <div style={{ display:"flex", height:"100vh", background:"#0c1014", fontFamily:"'Barlow',sans-serif", overflow:"hidden" }}>

      {/* ── FORM PANEL ── */}
      <div style={{ width:320, flexShrink:0, background:"#141e25", borderRight:"1px solid rgba(184,216,232,0.08)", overflowY:"auto", padding:"20px 16px", display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", gap:8 }}>

        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{ display:"flex", alignItems:"center", gap:10, marginBottom:16, paddingBottom:14, borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(184,216,232,0.08)" }}>
          <Brandmark size={28} blend={false} />
          <div>
            <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif", fontSize:"0.95rem", fontWeight:400, letterSpacing:"0.4em", color:BRAND.cream, textTransform:"uppercase" }}>Moment</div>
            <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.52rem", fontWeight:500, letterSpacing:"0.22em", color:BRAND.steel, textTransform:"uppercase", marginTop:2 }}>Graphic Editor</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Template */}
        <Section title="Template Style">
          <div style={{ display:"grid", gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr", gap:6, marginBottom:10 }}>
            {["dark","light"].map(t=>(
              <button key={t} onClick={()=>set("template",t)} style={{ padding:"8px", borderRadius:4,
                border:`1px solid ${s.template===t?BRAND.sky:"rgba(184,216,232,0.1)"}`,
                background: s.template===t?"rgba(184,216,232,0.1)":"rgba(36,49,58,0.3)",
                color: s.template===t?BRAND.sky:BRAND.steel,
                fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.62rem", fontWeight:700, letterSpacing:"0.16em", textTransform:"uppercase", cursor:"pointer" }}>
                {t==="dark"?"🌑 Dark":"☀️ Light"}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <label style={{ display:"block", fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.58rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.2em", color:BRAND.steel, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:6 }}>Active Tab</label>
          <div style={{ display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", gap:4 }}>
            {NAV_TABS.map((tab,i)=>(
              <button key={i} onClick={()=>set("activeTab",i)} style={{ padding:"6px 10px", borderRadius:3, textAlign:"left",
                border:`1px solid ${s.activeTab===i?BRAND.goldBorder:"rgba(184,216,232,0.08)"}`,
                background: s.activeTab===i?BRAND.goldDim:"transparent",
                color: s.activeTab===i?BRAND.gold:"#4a5c66",
                fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.62rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.14em", textTransform:"uppercase", cursor:"pointer" }}>
                {tab}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </Section>

        {/* Headline */}
        <Section title="Headline">
          <Field label="Line 1 (cream)" value={s.headline1} onChange={v=>set("headline1",v)} />
          <Field label="Line 2 (sky blue)" value={s.headline2} onChange={v=>set("headline2",v)} />
        </Section>

        {/* Scenario */}
        <Section title="Scenario Text">
          <Field label="Scenario" value={s.scenario} onChange={v=>set("scenario",v)} multiline />
        </Section>

        {/* Insight */}
        <Section title="Moment Insight">
          <Field label="Insight Text" value={s.insightText} onChange={v=>set("insightText",v)} multiline />
        </Section>

        {/* Stat bar */}
        <Section title="Stat Bar">
          <Field label="Stat Label" value={s.statLabel} onChange={v=>set("statLabel",v)} />
          <Field label="Stat Value" value={s.statValue} onChange={v=>set("statValue",v)} />
          <Field label="Stat Reference" value={s.statRef} onChange={v=>set("statRef",v)} />
        </Section>

        {/* Athlete 1 */}
        <Section title="Athlete 1">
          <Toggle label="Show Athlete 1" checked={s.showA1} onChange={v=>set("showA1",v)} />
          {s.showA1 && (
            <>
              <Field label="Name" value={s.a1Name} onChange={v=>set("a1Name",v)} />
              <Field label="Subtitle" value={s.a1Sub} onChange={v=>set("a1Sub",v)} />
              <label style={{ display:"block", fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.58rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.2em", color:BRAND.steel, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:6 }}>Data Rows</label>
              <RowEditor rows={s.a1Rows} onChange={r=>set("a1Rows",r)} template={s.template} />
            </>
          )}
        </Section>

        {/* Athlete 2 */}
        <Section title="Athlete 2">
          <Toggle label="Show Athlete 2" checked={s.showA2} onChange={v=>set("showA2",v)} />
          {s.showA2 && (
            <>
              <Field label="Name" value={s.a2Name} onChange={v=>set("a2Name",v)} />
              <Field label="Subtitle" value={s.a2Sub} onChange={v=>set("a2Sub",v)} />
              <label style={{ display:"block", fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.58rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.2em", color:BRAND.steel, textTransform:"uppercase", marginBottom:6 }}>Data Rows</label>
              <RowEditor rows={s.a2Rows} onChange={r=>set("a2Rows",r)} template={s.template} />
            </>
          )}
        </Section>

      </div>

      {/* ── PREVIEW PANEL ── */}
      <div style={{ flex:1, overflowY:"auto", padding:"32px", display:"flex", flexDirection:"column", alignItems:"center", gap:16,
        background:"radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%,rgba(36,49,58,0.4) 0%,transparent 70%),#0c1014" }}>
        <div style={{ textAlign:"center", marginBottom:8 }}>
          <div style={{ fontFamily:"'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif", fontSize:"0.56rem", fontWeight:600, letterSpacing:"0.3em", color:"#2a363d", textTransform:"uppercase" }}>Live Preview</div>
        </div>
        <div style={{ width:"100%", maxWidth:720 }}>
          <TemplatePreview s={s} />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
